title: pereskia aculeata var. longispina
intro: Pereskia aculeata var. longispina, also known as the dragon fruit cactus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and teas, which are used to treat a range of health problems.
